app/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target remain at 1.8.

app/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) to align with modern testing standards and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and modern tooling often require or strongly prefer JUnit 5; JUnit 4 may lack support for new features or cause runtime conflicts in test execution.

app/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support Java 21 language features or bytecode generation, leading to build failures.

app/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 and JUnit 5.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to execute tests on Java 21 or lack proper support for JUnit 5 engines.

app/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.ja.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 static assertion import to JUnit 5 Jupiter API.
app/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.ja.why_exists: org.junit.Assert class is removed in JUnit 5; code fails to compile with 'package org.junit does not exist' or 'cannot find symbol' errors.

app/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.ja.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 Test annotation import to JUnit 5 Jupiter API.
app/src/test/java/com/example/AppTest.ja.why_exists: org.junit.Test class is removed in JUnit 5; code fails to compile with 'package org.junit does not exist' or 'cannot find symbol' errors.
